purpose: Prevents concurrent release installer updates from breaking mid-install when operators click INSTALL UPDATE multiple times.

fields.token: handoff secret — panel passes to stealth_install via NEXUS_UPDATE_LOCK_TOKEN
fields.phase: download_tarball | extract_tarball | install_all | git_fetch | git_pull | stealth_install | stopping_services | copying_files | signing | starting_service | restarting | awaiting_sudo | failed
fields.heartbeat_at: last alive ping — stale locks auto-clear
